Hold & Win Jackpots
JackpotValue
MINI20× bet
MINOR50× bet
MAJOR150× bet
MEGA2,000× bet
GRAND10,000× bet
Rules
25 fixed paylines — wins pay left to right on adjacent reels.
🃏 Wild substitutes for all paying symbols.
🗺️ Scatter ×3 = 8 free spins | ×4 = 12 | ×5 = 20
🥇 Doubloon ×3+ may trigger Hold & Win feature.
During Hold & Win: 3 respins, reset on each new doubloon.
🧭 Boost: multiplies all doubloon values 2.5–5×.
💀 Mystery: transforms to random jackpot type.
Full grid (15 doubloons) = GRAND jackpot bonus!
Bonus Buy: 65× bet for guaranteed Hold & Win.
⚓ Pirate Treasure
